LAW AND MOTION 302, LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT PETER LEVIN IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN SHOWN. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE TO OPPOSE THE MOTION AND NO WRITTEN OPPOSITION. MR. PIERS IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER ON A JUDICIAL COUNSEL FORM LISTING ALL CONTACT INFORMATION FOR MR. LEVIN. THE ORDER MUST ALSO REFLECT "EFFECTIVE UPON SERVICE OF THE ORDER" AND LIST ALL FUTURE EVENTS/HEARING DATES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Theresa Bichel of Division of Labor Standards Enforcement telephone number 415-486-2083 for Plaintiff Angela Villanueva.
Sean Piers of Littler Mendelson, P.C. telephone number 415-439-6221 for Defendant Peter Levin.

Littler Mendelson, P.C.'s Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel of Record for Defendant Peter Levin is granted. Good cause has been shown. There was no appearance to oppose the motion and no written opposition. Mr. Piers is to provide a form of order on a judicial counsel form listing all contact information for Mr. Levin. The order must also reflect "effective upon service of the order" and list all future events/hearing dates.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
